findings.remediation: Use this inventory as baseline metadata for audit evidence.
findings.title: System information collected

findings.evidence: 27 package(s) upgradable. Sample: openssl, curl, libc6
findings.remediation: Run apt update && apt upgrade on a validated maintenance window.
findings.title: Pending package updates detected

findings.remediation: Enable UFW with a deny-by-default inbound policy.
findings.title: UFW installed but inactive

findings.remediation: Set `PasswordAuthentication no` and use SSH keys.
findings.title: SSH password authentication enabled

findings.remediation: Review each open service for business need and network restriction.
findings.title: Multiple externally reachable TCP listeners

findings.evidence: 41 enabled services detected. Sample: ssh.service, cron.service, rsyslog.service
findings.remediation: Keep startup services minimal and aligned with system role.
findings.title: Enabled services inventory

findings.remediation: Remove world-writable bits from sensitive paths (chmod o-w).
findings.title: Sensitive world-writable paths found
